title: ThresholdLevel Property
description: Sets the size of the square pixel neighborhood used to calculate mean intensity for a given pixel.
notes: ThresholdLevel is a percentage of the neighborhood mean intensity.  The size of the neighborhood is set by the ThresholdBlockSize property.  A pixel is set to 0 if its intensity is below its neighborhood mean intensity by this percentage, and set to 255 if its intensity is above its neighborhood mean intensity by this percentage.  This corresponds to the parameter "t" in the Bradley paper. In RC+ we offer the user the ability to adjust this parameter between 0-30%.  The default value of 15% works well for most situations.
